name: cli-verify-after-execute
description: Run ccw cli quality review after /maestro-execute completes

patches.content:
## CLI Verification (overlay)

After the phase execution finishes, run a read-only quality review with the CLI tool to catch regressions the execution might have introduced:

```
ccw cli -p "PURPOSE: Review just-executed changes for correctness and regressions; success = all critical issues surfaced
TASK: Scan modified files | Check new code against existing patterns | Flag any TODO/FIXME introduced | Verify error handling
MODE: analysis
CONTEXT: @./src/**/* | Memory: Just completed maestro-execute for the current phase
EXPECTED: Issue list with file:line references, severity, and suggested fix
CONSTRAINTS: Focus on changed files only
" --tool gemini --mode analysis --rule analysis-review-code-quality
```

If the review surfaces Critical or High issues, open them as maestro issues before marking the phase complete.
